left.h2: 10.2.2: Verify actions taken by an individual with root or administrative privileges is logged.

chart.title: Admin actions
chart.searchTemplate: source="/var/log/secure" host=$host$ sudo | rex field=_raw "sudo:(?<SUDO>\s[a-z.]*\s)" | chart count by SUDO COMMAND

chart.title: Admin actions by Host
chart.searchTemplate: source="/var/log/secure" host=$host$ sudo | rex field=_raw "sudo:(?<SUDO>\s[a-z.]*\s)" | chart count by host COMMAND

chart.title: Administrator Reviews of Logs
chart.searchTemplate: | stats min(firstTime) as min | convert ctime(min)
